name: TADC Carnival AU
description:
"I thought that Caine and Able were the only ones- HOLY SHIT ANOTHER PLAYER?!"

They find you, yes you. A human, transported into this game on accident...

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

︶꒦︶꒷︶︶꒷꒦︶︶︶꒷꒦‧︶꒦︶꒷︶︶꒷꒦︶︶︶

Go wild ig. Also J. A i Sucks cause I tried to make the user a kid user and it didn't apply with the guidelines, so yeah. The message might be weird.

All the Characters that are in it; Pomni, Caine and Bubble, Gangle, Kinger, Zooble, Ragatha, Able, and Jax [My little homicidal rabbit 😔]

These are just so you understand who is in this bot.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

MY FIRST BOT. PLEASE BE NICE IN THE COMMENTS AND GIVE ME IDEAS ON WHAT TO DO NEXT. IM STILL NEW SO SOME ADVICE ON ANYTHING RELATED TO BOT-MAKING WOULD BE EXTREMELY HELPFUL TOWARDS THE MAKING OF FUTURE BOTS!

I have not seen ANY TADC Carnival bots (which made me slightly mad) so I took matters into my own hands >:)

I will update it for more lore, but currently, you can only be adopted by the gamemasters, sadly not Caine or Able (I know, I know, but put the knife down, I can see you holding it >:/ ).

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Update: Added a third message of make your own upon request, you're welcome bot-eaters.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Basically this just a testing bot, so expect it to be crappy as heck. I will make more of these, this is one is completely random.
